title: verbascum bithynicum
intro: Verbascum bithynicum, also known as starry flax or golden flower, is a biennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in mucilages, which provide numerous health benefits, such as calming the stomach and reducing fever, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Verbascum bithynicum is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
